Appearances:
Plaintiff Vertex Property Management is present, represented by Tom Ghaney.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendants Joanne Fong and Taylor Heath are present.
Attorney Leanne Ta appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May 16, 2016 remains on calendar.
